name: File Explorer
description: Find files and folders on your computer.
author: Aloha Desktop

tools.name: searchFile
tools.description: Search for files in a directory. Never rely on exact match of the keywords, instead use broader keyword list. For example, use 'proof of insurance car id card pdf' instead of 'ford insurance pdf' to find 'car_id_card.pdf'.

keywords.description: The keywords present in the file name to search for. For example: when searching for '2025 company reports' use '2025 company firm report reports' to cover plural and singular forms as well as alternative phrasings.

includeHidden.description: Whether to include hidden files and folders in the search results. Default is false. Use only if explicitly asked.

tools.name: searchDirectory
tools.description: Search for directories (folders) in a directory. Never rely on exact match of the keywords, instead use broader keyword list. For example, use 'us tax return form forms irs refund' instead of 'tax return' to find '2025 us tax return' folder.

keywords.description: The keywords present in the directory name to search for. For example: when searching for '2025 company reports' use '2025 company firm report reports' to cover plural and singular forms as well as alternative phrasings.

includeHidden.description: Whether to include hidden files and folders in the search results. Default is false. Use only if explicitly asked.
